name: gravitas
description: Interview transcription that measures narrative gravity. The /interview skill turns a social-science interview into a dual-engine verified, speaker-diarized transcript coded against a selectable versioned codebook — narrative gravity by default, or moral identity under public confrontation — with an optional episode layer that keeps multi-target recordings apart (.docx + JSON sidecar). Bundles the upstream /watch video skill unchanged.

interface.shortDescription: Interview transcription that measures narrative gravity.
interface.longDescription: Gravitas ingests a social-science interview recording (or a folder of them) and produces a dual-engine verified, speaker-diarized transcript with moments of narrative gravity — emotional displays, repetitions, quoted speech, temporal shifts — flagged against a versioned codebook with frame evidence. Output is a Word transcript with anchored comments plus a machine-readable JSON sidecar. Bundles the upstream /watch video skill unchanged.
